title: Token verification endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Verifies token: finds auth_tokens by hash, checks revoked_at IS NULL
Returns: valid=true, agent_id, name, scopes (from identity.agents), account_id, tier
Returns 401 with {valid: false} for invalid/expired/revoked tokens
Updates last_used_at on auth_tokens on successful verification
Audit log entry: token.verified event with ip, user_agent, timestamp
